name: python3-lzallright
title: python3-lzallright
description:
Python binding for LZ library (Python 3)
This package contains a Python 3.8+ binding for LZok_hand library which is a
minimal, C++14 implementation of the LZO compression format.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-lzallright because Python binding for LZ library (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-lzallright as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-lzallright with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-lzallright --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
